content:
RU translation/partial proofread for the majority of the FULL TERMS sheet (March version if it matters). That's a huge freaking column of terms. Worked on by pretty much every member of the RU team.
<@183782216353054720> please tell me if there's some formatting or other tweaks we need to do to upload it properly. Grey words are the new and re-translated terms, black words are either GPT or old terms from 2025 that already got into the system. Hopefully text coloring doesn't mess the uploading up.

UPD: Disregard this message and the attachment, refer to an upload by Haps. We've forgot to fix Vortice's name in Russian, now it's prim and proper.

Riddle forgot to fix some important names. Sending fixed file on his behalf.
Please, use this version instead! <@183782216353054720>
Heya! This isn't the kind of file I handle, you'll need to give this to <@1376763322568937562>
